pages.title: Knight Faction
pages.text: The Knight Order of the taiga. Twenty-three ultra-hard recipes. Claim with $(l:factions/overview)/cabafaction claim knight$(/l).

pages.title: Armor sets
pages.text: $(bold)Old Knight, Silver Knight, Dragonslayer, Spark of Dawn, Fog Guard.$(/) Each is helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots.

pages.title: Signature weapons
pages.text: $(bold)Dragonslayer Halberd, Fog Guard Sword, Spark of Dawn Polearm.$(/)$(br2)These three blades also exist on $(l:classes/blacksmith)Blacksmith$(/l) at standard difficulty. The Knight faction recipe is the ultra-hard regalia version — same item, different signature.
